subject: WM-0032 review: verified
body: No blocking findings; M2 DAG is acyclic and starts with WM-0033 planning plus WM-0034 architecture gate before implementation; WM-0033-WM-0043 packets include required fields; scope and gates preserve Worker/headless authority, sim-core purity, bounded indexed selection, serializable jobs, structured reasons, save/replay and Worker parity; no runtime implementation files changed; owner gates reproduced.
